nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1993; const int b = 2085; const int c = 2111; const int d = 2130; const int e = 2147; const int f = 2162; const int g = 2176; const int h = 2190; const int i = 2204; const int j = 2219; const int k = 2235; const int l = 2254; const int m = 2280; const int n = 2373;
